title: Customer Support Engineer H-1B LCA 2024 — All Employers | h1bdata.info
note: 17 records; median $100.9K; H-1B wage Level I (entry prevailing wage): Starburst Data $90K (Round Rock TX), KLA Corporation $92K–$93K (AZ/NY). These employers span growth-stage to mid-market; used as Level I floor for high-growth-public tier.
